data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement that 'some providers work multiple locations', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the specific working arrangements of providers across multiple locations. While the linked use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at different locations, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that validate this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming that some providers work multiple locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for provider location assignments
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that providers are assigned to multiple locations.
